title: 60Pcs Wooden Christmas Tree Decorations Christmas Krafts and Arts for Kids Toddlers DIY Xmas Wooden Ornaments Paint Decorate Your Own Christmas Decorations
features: 🎄[Package Contents]: 5 x 10 wooden Christmas ornaments, 10 pieces of each style come in 5 shapes of Christmas tree, snowflake, snowman, round, star.

🎄[Perfect Size]: The round ornament measures 8.9 x 7.6cm, the snowflake, Christmas tree and star measure approx 7.6 x 7.6cm, the rope length is 30cm. Ideal for Christmas decorations, just paint and decorate them to create a unique ornament that you can use year after year.

🎄[Natural Material]: Raw wood Christmas decorations are made of high quality natural wood, laser cut and polished. Both sides are sanded for a smooth finish, ready for painting, writing, decorating, it's safe for kids as an eco-friendly Christmas gift.

【Wonderful Christmas Gift】: These wood Slices are carved nicely. The fashion and cute Christmas design, conform to Christmas theme and winter atmospher, making the happiness and joy to your families to celebrate the Christmas.

【Wide Applications】: These wooden pendants are suitable for DIY scrapbooking, crafting, table confetti, Christmas tree decorations. Perfect for Christmas, party, wedding and holiday decoration. Christmas Hanging Ornaments also can be used an coasters, card making, embellishments, photo props and many others art and craft projects.
description: Features: 1. Each wooden ornaments has a hole, just pass the hemp rope through the small hole, it can be used as decoration for Christmas tree, living rooms, tables, fireplace. 2. 6 different Christmas styles, including snowflake, snowman, Christmas tree, bulbs, stars, deer, exquisite and beautiful decorations, creating strong Christmas atmosphere. 3. Both sides of the wooden ornaments are blank, you can use your imagination to paste patterns or decorate your own Christmas decorations. 4. These wooden xmas decorations are great decoration for Christmas tree, gift labels, card making, scrapbooks, sign making, or other DIY crafts. Specification: Material: Wooden Size: Round: 6.5cm Snowflake: 8cm Christmas tree: 8 x 6.7cm Deer: 8.5 x 6cm Snowman: 7.8 x 7.8cm Star: 8cm Bell: 1cm Twine string length: 26cm Patterns: Christmas tree, snowflake, snowman, bulbs, stars, deer Packing Includes: 60 × Wooden Christmas Ornaments Notes: 1. Due to the lighting effects and filming angles, there is a color difference in the product, please understand. 2. Due to manual measurement, there is a tolerance in the product size.
